Cool.

> However linimon's question still stands:
> 
> Yvan - are you willing to relinquish maintainership if John wants it?
> John - are you willing to take maintainership if Yvan is willing?

I said I don't have easy access to a specific setup where /var is on
mfs, to check if John's patches really fixes the issue.
I just checked his patch doesn't break things on a standard install.

I'm still an ipsec-tools developper, I'm still working on IPsec on
FreeBSD, and actually, I still have enough time to do most of the work
for ipsec-tools port.

I'll be the first to warn you if those things changes.


Yvan.
